governing_logic: Sheresh is infrastructure civilization first and settlement civilization second. Administrative thickening follows maintenance burden rather than noble multiplication.

role_bands.function: Keeps settlement shells intact through crack patrols, seal maintenance, contamination baffles, vent watches, and emergency isolation protocols.
Turns heat and power into civil survival through reactor tending, conduit balancing, rationed energy release, and blackout prevention.
Maintains subterranean archives, aurora study, astral conduit handling, controlled experiment access, and exportable innovation records.
Administers ration order, sleeping rotations, hazard dispatch, evacuation routing, corpse handling, and rescue logistics.
Integrates mutation-adapted life into ordinary law through accommodation offices, contamination screening, protected labor placement, and social-normalization protocols.

anchor_allocations.functional_profile: Primary archive commune where subterranean records, astral study, and seal-maintenance bureaucracy overlap.
Transit shelter and study corridor where aurora observation, survival routing, and hazard checks meet.
A natural consequence of dome society needing a specialized repair-and-material node.
A natural consequence of route hazard and rescue logic across the polar zone.

anchor_allocations.anchor_kind: secondary archive and copy integrity node
anchor_allocations.functional_profile: A natural consequence of subterranean archives and knowledge export needing redundancy.
A natural consequence of contamination pressure and controlled entry into dome systems.
A natural consequence of energy systems being too important to remain generic background.
A natural consequence of aurora study, mutation adaptation, and edge settlement survivability.
A natural consequence of ration order, water capture, and survival stockpiling.
